title: Hudium
description: Tons of HUD tweaks including player stats, block/entity info, durability info, etc. No more pain installing that many mods!
body: # Hudium Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/zfPcG37uvm)! Hudium is a client-side utility mod that provides many HUD-related tweaks and additions to show more information about the game. It aims to integrate as many features as possible into a single mod, so players don't need to worry about installing that many mods to achieve the same goal. It is designed to have no extra library required. (Before 1.2.0 you can optionally install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for the in-game config screen) Features implemented: * Player Stats * Block/Entity Info * *With primitive plugin support* * Durability Info * More to come... Every single feature can be toggled via the config. Since 1.2.0, this mod also bundles a simple config screen. Also, I appreciate feature requests and bug reports. If you want a new feature, you can just come to [the issues](https://github.com/IntelligentCreations/Hudium/issues) and open one, and I'll try to implement/fix it if I have time. This mod, including the library ([Omega Config](https://github.com/Draylar/omega-config) and [SpruceUI](https://github.com/LambdAurora/SpruceUI)) it uses, is licensed under MIT. Feel free to add it into your modpack. Forge port will be developed once the mod is made to actually use no libraries, including the JiJ ones.
